headline: Is CME Group Inc. (CME) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CME a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on CME Group Inc. on DividendInvestor’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CME. CME Group Inc.’s share was trading at $286.82 as of May 5th. CME’s trailing and forward P/E were 24.77 and 23.75 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Is CME Group Expanding Into the Compute Futures Market?
summary: CME expands into AI infrastructure with planned compute futures tied to GPU pricing, aiming to bring transparency and hedging tools to the market.

headline: CME Group (CME) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Pause And Mixed Undervaluation Signals
summary: Why CME Group (CME) is on investors’ radar today CME Group (CME) sits at the center of global futures and options trading, and its recent share performance has drawn attention, with the stock up 10.6% over the past year despite a softer past 3 months. For investors watching exchanges and market infrastructure companies, CME Group’s US$6.7b in revenue and US$4.2b in net income highlight a business that is heavily tied to trading activity across interest rates, equity indexes, foreign exchange,...
